name: Identify Variable Star in WASP-12 Field
description: A time series of 186 calibrated CCD frames of the WASP-12 stellar field is loaded in AstroImageJ as an image sequence in ~/AstroImages/variable_search/. These are real r-band observations from the University of Louisville. One of the bright stars in this field exhibits transit-like variability (periodic dimming). Perform multi-aperture differential photometry on at least 5 bright stars in the field (including at least 2 comparison stars) to identify the variable star. Create a text report file named variable_star_report.txt in the current directory that includes: (1) the identity of the variable star (aperture label or pixel coordinates), (2) the approximate depth of the brightness dip as a fraction or percentage, and (3) the approximate timing (frame numbers or JD) of the minimum brightness. Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
